tasks.instruction: Add the three most recently published English commercial voiceover demos under 30 seconds to your favorites list.

target_names: Drama Showreel 2025  City Cop & Public Defender

tasks.instruction: Request a quote for an approximately 60-second online ad voiceover, adjusting the usage duration if needed so the calculator estimate stays at or under a $600 budget, and submit this configuration via the inquiry form.

expected_values.inquiry_message: Requesting a 60-second online ad voiceover quote as configured in the calculator, staying within a $600 budget.

tasks.instruction: Submit a booking request for a 2-hour directed remote recording session scheduled for a mid-April 2026 morning at 10:00 AM in a US Eastern time zone, selecting two different preferred remote connection methods.

expected_values.additional_details: If 10:00 AM is unavailable, a backup time is 2:00 PM the same day.

tasks.instruction: Create a project plan combining a commercial voiceover service and an on-camera self-tape service, adjusting the acting option if needed so the total recording time is at most 3 hours, then save it with a maximum budget under $1,000 and a note that the commercial voiceover should be prioritized if the schedule is tight.

target_names: Commercial voiceover  up to 60 seconds (1 hour session)

expected_values.notes_text: If schedule is tight, prioritize recording the commercial voiceover first.

tasks.instruction: Use the newsletter signup form to subscribe with a casting-related email at example.com, selecting interests in commercial voiceover, animation, and drama acting, and choose a monthly summary frequency without any weekly emails while enabling casting availability updates if offered.
